title: BEM-604 actual provider route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

paths={
 'curator_intake':'governance/curator/inbox/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
 'role_orchestrator_intake':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/curator_operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
 'internal_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
 'analyst_plan':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan.json',
 'auditor_report':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json',
 'executor_selftest':'governance/internal_contour/executor/reports/bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline.json',
 'executor_request':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json',
 'final_status':'governance/internal_contour/final/bem601_operator_decision_pipeline_final.json',
 'claude_token_smoke':'governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md',
 'claude_token_smoke_fix':'governance/reports/bem568_trigger_claude_token_smoke_now.md',
 'claude_code_workflow':'.github/workflows/claude-code.yml',
 'claude_token_workflow':'.github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml',
 'provider_status':'governance/state/provider_status.json',
 'provider_probe':'governance/reports/provider_probe.md'
}
exists={k:{'path':v,'exists':Path(v).exists(),'size':Path(v).stat().st_size if Path(v).exists() else 0} for k,v in paths.items()}

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

# Evidence classification
file_based_chain_ok=all(exists[k]['exists'] and exists[k]['size']>0 for k in ['curator_intake','role_orchestrator_intake','internal_task','analyst_plan','auditor_report','executor_selftest','final_status'])
claude_primary_evidence=[]
for key in ['claude_token_smoke','claude_code_workflow','provider_status','provider_probe']:
    text=read(paths[key])
    if text:
        claude_primary_evidence.append({'key':key,'path':paths[key],'snippet':text[:500]})

# Look in transport for provider/probe/claude records.
transport_text=read('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
markers={
 'contains_claude_code': 'claude' in transport_text.lower(),
 'contains_provider_probe': 'provider_probe' in transport_text.lower() or 'provider probe' in transport_text.lower(),
 'contains_reserve': 'reserve' in transport_text.lower(),
 'contains_gpt_internal_executor': 'gpt_internal_executor' in transport_text,
 'contains_python_executor': 'python' in transport_text.lower() or 'codex' in transport_text.lower()
}

actual_route={
 'curator_role':'GPT/file-based through Deno/Codex task artifacts',
 'registrar_or_orchestrator':'file-based router scripts and JSON inboxes',
 'analyst_role':'GPT-generated internal analyst plan via Python executor',
 'auditor_role':'GPT-generated internal audit via diagnosis task, not live Claude Code auditor',
 'executor_role':'Python executor/GitHub Actions selftest, not live Claude Code executor',
 'provider_probe_before_executor':'not proven for this BEM-599..603 chain',
 'primary_claude_code_contour_used':'not proven',
 'reserve_gpt_contour_used':'yes, effectively GPT/Python executor path handled the task',
 'route_verdict':'FILE_BASED_RESERVE_GPT_PATH_COMPLETED; CLAUDE_CODE_PRIMARY_NOT_PROVEN'
}

checks=[
 {'name':'curator_intake_exists','pass':exists['curator_intake']['exists']},
 {'name':'role_orchestrator_intake_exists','pass':exists['role_orchestrator_intake']['exists']},
 {'name':'internal_task_exists','pass':exists['internal_task']['exists']},
 {'name':'analyst_plan_exists','pass':exists['analyst_plan']['exists']},
 {'name':'auditor_report_exists','pass':exists['auditor_report']['exists']},
 {'name':'executor_selftest_exists','pass':exists['executor_selftest']['exists']},
 {'name':'final_status_exists','pass':exists['final_status']['exists']},
 {'name':'provider_probe_evidence_exists','pass':exists['provider_status']['exists'] or exists['provider_probe']['exists']},
 {'name':'claude_primary_execution_proof_exists','pass':False},
]
blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_CODE_PRIMARY_CONTOUR_NOT_PROVEN','message':'The chain completed through GPT/Deno/Codex/Python executor artifacts. There is no proof in inspected repo artifacts that Claude Code primary auditor/executor provider was probed and used for this specific task.'}
status='reserve_path_completed_primary_not_proven'

report_obj={'schema_version':'actual_provider_route_audit.v1','audit_id':'bem604_audit_actual_provider_route','status':status,'actual_route':actual_route,'file_based_chain_ok':file_based_chain_ok,'path_evidence':exists,'transport_markers':markers,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:02 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'actual_provider_route_bem604.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(report_obj,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem604_audit_actual_provider_route.md'
report_lines=['# BEM-604 | Audit Actual Provider Route','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:02 (UTC+3)', '', '## Verdict', status, '', '## Actual route', json.dumps(actual_route,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## File based chain ok', str(file_based_chain_ok), '', '## Checks', json.dumps(checks,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Blocker', json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report.write_text(sep.join(report_lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem604_audit_actual_provider_route','cycle_id':'bem604-audit-actual-provider-route','source':'gpt','status':status,'actual_route':actual_route,'file_based_chain_ok':file_based_chain_ok,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:02 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem604_audit_actual_provider_route']={'status':status,'actual_route':actual_route,'file_based_chain_ok':file_based_chain_ok,'blocker':blocker,'report':str(report),'state_file':str(state_file)}
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:02 (UTC+3)'
contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem604_audit_actual_provider_route.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-604: actual provider route audited. verdict='+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Audited actual provider route and recorded that Claude Code primary contour was not proven for this task')
"""
